conditional: Subject to the clubs bridging a significant gap in valuation.
fpl_impact: A move to Serie A would remove Chalobah from FPL selection.
headline: Como eye Chelsea defender Trevoh Chalobah
body: Como have expressed interest in Chelsea center-back Trevoh Chalobah, but a transfer remains difficult due to a large gap in the clubs' valuations.
text:
🚨 Como are interested in Chelsea CB Trevoh Chalobah but there’s big gap in valuation at this stage.

Difficult deal as #CFC value Chalobah highly and Como are being careful with their budget.

🎥 piped.video/c9LMAexmR0k
